## File type

PDF or PPTX?

## Browser and OS

Example: Chrome on Windows 11

Describe the issue.

## Expected result

What did you expect to happen?

## Error message

Paste any visible error message here.

or

## Sensitive files

Do not upload sensitive files or private business documents.
